comments.body: Implemented the 4 clearly-valid drift fixes: api-stability.md 0.6.0->0.7.1; event-schema.md ticket_txn.py->_commands/txn.py; README CLI block gains 'rebar idea' + 'rebar explain'; new tests/unit/test_version_sync.py asserts api-stability.md 'currently X.Y.Z' == pyproject.toml version (a unit test = CI guard that gates on the change's own tree, no workflow-bootstrap lag). DIVERGED from 'delete docs/bash-migration.md': the plan-review flagged (valid) that the ticket's 'no inbound links' premise is false — bash-migration.md has ~14 inbound refs incl 9 production-source module docstrings (validate.py, next_batch.py, lock.py, composer.py, leaf.py, unlink.py, _seam.py, _lib_writes.py, _commands/__init__.py cite its section numbers) plus README:604 and docs/archive/*. Deleting it would orphan all those citations, so it is kept as the historical migration record. config.py:442 'Release: 0.6.0' marker was already removed by 7c92, so that item is a no-op.

compiled_state.description:
## Finding (DOC — verified; merged D1-D5)
Documentation drift accumulated this window. Individually below the impact floor but bundled here as one cheap sweep.

Citations:
- `docs/event-schema.md:32,47,48` cite deleted `ticket_txn.py` (now `src/rebar/_commands/txn.py`).
- `docs/api-stability.md:3` says "currently 0.6.0"; real version is 0.7.1 (`pyproject.toml:10`).
- README CLI block (`README.md:317-340`) omits `rebar explain` (`_cli/__init__.py:393-396`) and `rebar idea` (`_cli/__init__.py:69`).
- `docs/bash-migration.md` (STATUS: COMPLETE, no inbound links) — delete it (removes its stale `ticket_txn.py` refs for free).
- Stale `Release: 0.6.0` marker at `src/rebar/config.py:442` (deprecation registry doc).

## Remediation
Delete `docs/bash-migration.md` (confirm/remove any `docs/architecture.md` pointer); update `event-schema.md` module refs to `_commands/txn.py`; sync `api-stability.md` + `config.py:442` to 0.7.1; add `rebar explain` + `rebar idea` to the README CLI block. Add a small VERSION-SYNC CI guard that fails if `api-stability.md`'s version diverges from `pyproject.toml` (skip the brittle stale-name grep — deleting bash-migration.md makes it moot).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/bash-migration.md` deleted; no dangling references to it
- [ ] `event-schema.md` cites `_commands/txn.py` (no `ticket_txn.py` in docs/)
- [ ] `api-stability.md` + `config.py:442` show the real version (0.7.1)
- [ ] README CLI block lists `rebar explain` and `rebar idea`
- [ ] CI fails if api-stability.md version diverges from pyproject.toml
compiled_state.title: Documentation drift sweep + delete bash-migration.md + version-sync CI guard
